vulnerability.title: Ensure the Default C Shell Umask is Set Correctly
vulnerability.description: To ensure the default umask for users of the C shell is set properly, add or correct the umask setting in /etc/csh.cshrc to read as follows: umask
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then var_accounts_user_umask='' grep -q "^\s*umask" /etc/csh.cshrc && \ sed -i -E -e "s/^(\s*umask).*/\1 $var_accounts_user_umask/g" /etc/csh.cshrc if ! [ $? -eq 0 ]; then echo "umask $var_accounts_user_umask" >> /etc/csh.cshrc fi else >&2 echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' fi
vulnerability.group: Ensure that Users Have Sensible Umask Values
